name: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc.
description_short: Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. at 11931 Elam Rd #101, Balch Springs, TX 75180 is Mon-Fri 10:00 AM – 6:00 PM. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.9 stars across 226 reviews. Call +1 972-557-5787.
description_long:
Texas Car Title and Payday Loan Services, Inc. is a brick-and-mortar consumer lending company operating storefront locations across Texas. The Sunnyvale branch at 3535 North Belt Line Road serves residents of Sunnyvale, Mesquite, Garland, Balch Springs, and Forney. The company focuses exclusively on short-term, high-speed lending products designed for borrowers facing urgent cash needs who may not qualify for traditional bank loans.

The company offers three distinct loan products. Car title loans use a borrower's lien-free vehicle as collateral, allowing access to amounts up to $15,000 while the borrower retains use of the vehicle during repayment. Payday loans are short-term cash advances tied to the borrower's income, requiring a pay stub, valid ID, and active checking account. Installment loans offer longer repayment terms with fixed monthly payments and require similar documentation to payday loans. All three products are marketed as accessible to borrowers with bad or limited credit histories.

The Sunnyvale location distinguishes itself through speed: the company advertises cash disbursement in as little as 30 minutes after vehicle inspection and document submission. An online request form allows borrowers to initiate the process before visiting the store, and a representative calls back to confirm details. The store's hours — Monday through Friday 10AM–6PM and Saturday 9AM–1PM — are narrower than some competitors, and the branch is closed on Sundays.

Honestly, this lender serves a real need for consumers who have exhausted conventional options, but the products carry meaningful risk. Title loans and payday loans in Texas are typically offered at triple-digit APRs — the website does not disclose any interest rates, fees, or APR figures, which is a significant transparency gap. Borrowers who use a vehicle as collateral risk repossession if they default. Payday loans carry well-documented rollover and debt-cycle risks. This lender is best approached as a last resort after exploring credit unions, employer advances, and nonprofit emergency assistance.
pros: Cash available in as little as 30 minutes after vehicle inspection
No credit check required for title loans and payday loans
Borrower keeps and drives their vehicle throughout the repayment period
Loan amounts up to $15,000 available via title loans
Three product options (title, payday, installment) to match different needs
Online request form lets borrowers start the process before visiting the store
Bad credit explicitly accepted — approval based on vehicle value or income, not credit score
cons: No APR, interest rates, or fee disclosures anywhere on the website — a major transparency red flag
Title loans put the borrower's vehicle at risk of repossession upon default
Payday loans carry high rollover risk and can trap borrowers in repeat-borrowing cycles
Limited hours (closed Sundays, Saturday only until 1PM) may be inconvenient for working borrowers
Single storefront location limits accessibility to residents outside the immediate Sunnyvale area
best_for: Texas vehicle owners with a lien-free title who need emergency cash quickly and have poor credit
Employed borrowers in the Sunnyvale/Mesquite/Garland area needing a short-term advance against their paycheck
Consumers who have been declined by banks or credit unions and need same-day funds
Borrowers who need more than a few hundred dollars and cannot qualify for a personal loan
diagnosis: Best suited for Texas residents with a paid-off vehicle or steady income who need emergency cash fast and cannot qualify for conventional lending due to poor credit. The main caveat is significant: interest rates and fees are not disclosed on the website, and both title loans and payday loans carry high APRs typical of the industry — borrowers should request full cost disclosure before signing any agreement.
services: Installment loans with fixed monthly payments
In-store loan processing and document verification
Vehicle inspection for title loan valuation
No-credit-check underwriting for title and payday products
In-person customer service at Sunnyvale storefront
